name: Washimi
description: A secretary bird who works as the secretary to the company's president, and is arguably the company's de facto president due to the actual president's utter incompetence. Strong-willed, confident, and very level-headed.

name: Zwei
description: The title character of the story, Zwei was a perfectly ordinary tourist from Japan, before witnessing an Inferno assassination in America and being kidnapped. He was able to elude his pursuers long enough for them to realize he had a natural survival instinct that was perfect for an assassin. He had his memory erased through a combination of drug and hypnotherapy. name: Amy Rose
description: A young hedgehog who also happens to be [Sonic](https://anilist.co/character/2882/)'s most loyal fan. name: Arisu Mizuki
description: Lain's classmate and her only true friend throughout the series, Alice is a devoted confident and has a simple, sincere personality. She is the first to attempt to help Lain socialize by taking her to a nightclub, and from this point always tries to protect and take care of her. Alice is introduced as the shyest part of a junior high school trio, but her character development shows a fearless dedication to her friends. name: Coustas
description: He is a young boy with dark skin, dark eyes, and long dark hair. He is occasionally drawn with sharp and noticeable canines. After an incident that left his legs unusable, he also uses a sealchair.

name: Gan Saibou
description: He was born mutated because the normal cell who grew him made a copying error in his DNA. His mutation causes him to appear different from normal cells and to replicate uncontrollably, causing potentially deadly cancer. ~!He was killed by U-1146 twice. It is still uncertain whether he will remain dead or return.!~

name: Honda
description: Honda is a skinny skeleton who is usually seen slouching. He is a reserved and polite skeleton which makes him a likable person but also makes it hard for him to socialize with others. Honda also has a hard time dealing with children as he views them as "too pure" or "too cute".

name: Iharu Furuhashi
description: __Height:__ 177 cm Iharu Furuhashi is a young officer of the Third Division of the Defense Force. ~!After the destruction of Tachikawa Base, he was transferred to the Fourth Division.!~ ~!Back when Iharu was still in middle school, he was saved from a kaiju by [Mina Ashiro](https://anilist.co/character/180693/Mina-Ashiro). This event would later inspire him to become a Defense Force member.!~

name: Judau Ashta
description: __Era:__ Universal Century At the start of the series, Judau and his friends are poor junk dealers at the space colony of Shangri-La in Side 1. Judau is rather loudmouthed and straightfoward, but has a good heart and displays powerful Newtype abilities. He has a younger sister named Leina whom he cares very deeply for. name: Kafka
description: On the Interastral Peace Corporation's wanted list, Kafka's record only shows her name and a note about her "interest in collecting coats." name: Naki
description: Naki is a ghoul who was imprisoned in Cochlea until Aogiri Tree's invasion on the prison. He was liberated by Aogiri Tree due to being a direct underling and supposedly the right hand man of Yamori. He was almost always accompanied by the Twins Gagi and Guge. He eventually climbs the ranks within Aogiri, and has become an Executive in his own right.
